headline: Creating the largest network of programmatically connected digital-out-of-home screens throughout Africa through one point of contact
summary:
With over 16 years of experience in the digital-out-of-home (DOOH) industry, I am passionate about creating a more inclusive, transparent, and accountable programmatic ecosystem in South Africa and beyond. As the Founder and Managing Director of Polygon, I lead a team of experts who are dedicated to connecting and unifying DOOH networks across the continent, creating new revenue opportunities for the OOH industry to reach and engage audiences with relevant and impactful messages, and I strive to make it more accessible, measurable, and adaptable for the changing market needs.

Before founding Polygon in 2023, I was the Commercial Director at Tractor Outdoor, one of the largest and most innovative independent OOH media owners in South Africa. There, I spearheaded the adoption, education, and integration of programmatic DOOH, working with leading DSPs, agencies, and brands to deliver successful campaigns across various sectors and locations. I also contributed to the growth and development of the company, securing multiple awards and recognitions, such as the MOST Awards and the Smarties MMA Awards.
location_str: City of Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Founder | Managing Director
experiences.description:
Having lead the charge for programmatic digital-out-of-home (DOOH) adoption, education and integrations in South Africa, I've identified key changes that I want to see in the market to create a more inclusive programmatic ecosystem - these include:

- Including more DOOH networks into the foray (retail/airports/bars/taverns/casinos/pharmacies/malls)
- Getting the African continent programmatically connected and unified
- Creating additional revenue opportunities into the OOH category
- Making DOOH more transparent and accountable to buyers
- Driving standardization and best practices
- Increasing access for buyers with new DSP integrations

accomplishment_projects.title: #ClashWall
accomplishment_projects.description: What do you get when you combine a graffiti artist, a canvas and social media? @Converse_Africa in collaboration with Tractor Outdoor have implemented South Africa's first live graffiti exhibition with creative suggestions being spurred on via the #clashwall #CT Twitter hashtags. The event, located at the famous yellow Clock Tower at the V&A Waterfront ran from the 28th February till the 3rd March 2014. A local street artist was on hand bridging the gap between outdoor and social media by creating the concepts that were suggested by inspired twitter fans. People were then encouraged to snap pictures and share them amongst social media platforms. The project was an immense success with many locals coming out to see the concept as it came alive from a drab canvas to an inspiring piece of artwork.

accomplishment_projects.title: Converse
accomplishment_projects.description: Tractor Outdoor in collaboration with Hooley have created a range of products for Converse using material which was once used as billboard vinyl. The end result was beautifully designed and produced iPad covers, Laptop and Duffel bags.

accomplishment_projects.title: iFix
accomplishment_projects.description: iFix utilized one of Tractors mid-sized wall-mounted sites located on the main road, just around the corner from their store. Tractor helped with the creative concept which included the headline “Bad Apple?” and using basic directional information to lead foot traffic to the store.

accomplishment_projects.title: "Heita"
accomplishment_projects.description: Tractor Outdoor contributed to the bulk of the billboards in the Western and Eastern Cape focusing on strategic locations of public gatherings. Tractor worked closely 8.ta on a strategic level to advise them on the best use of outdoor as well as placements that would deliver the highest return on investment.

accomplishment_projects.title: TopTV
accomplishment_projects.description: Tractor Outdoor contributed to majority of the outdoor for the campaign by utilizing 150 Full Wrap buses across South Africa. Seven high impact billboards were also selected to blanket Cape Town and increase the frequency of Top TV’s message. This is by far the largest South African campaign that Tractor has embarked on with a staggering 14,000sqm2+ of advertising vinyl printed for all media.

accomplishment_projects.title: WBPTS
accomplishment_projects.description: WPBTS decided to utilize various Print titles, local Radio stations and one of Tractors double-sided Supersite billboards located on the N2 to increase general awareness of blood donation requirements. They cleverly adopted creative that targeted commuters travelling towards the City during morning hours with the subtle slogan “Give Life, Donate Blood”. This message hit home when the same commuters drove home passing the new creative “Stop the Bloody Excuses. Give Life, Donate Blood.”

accomplishment_projects.title: #SendingLove
accomplishment_projects.description: User-generated messages of love and unity were displayed on digital out of home screens worldwide with social media amplification ensuring the messages were seen by millions - at home. The #SendingLove was global initiative promoting messages of love that united communities all over the world during the fight against the effects of Covid-19. Launched by outdoor specialist Talon Outdoor, the socially-enabled DOOH campaign was facilitated by The World Out of Home Organisation (WOO) and many of its member organisations and ran on advertising space donated by over 70 media owners across 153 cities making it the biggest UGC campaign ever to run on digital out of home. Created by Grand Visual, the campaign encouraged participants to send love to those in places they cannot travel to, by getting creative with the heart-hand symbol. Participants were then given the option to donate to the global Covid-19 Solidarity Response Fund before receiving a photo of their picture playing on-screen in their chosen city to share with friends and family across social channels. The campaign was facilitated by Plexus, Talon’s global OOH network, who along with their partners have built a campaign with a total OOH media value of $15m. Tractor Outdoor was on board to help display messages of love to people in the Gauteng, KwaZulu-Natal, Western and Eastern Cape regions. The system developed by Grand Visual geo targeted messages to the chosen city, connecting communities to messages of love from afar in a show of global strength and solidarity.

recommendations:
Jamie Norgarb

Remi is a super smart guy, with a passion for what he does! I have loved working with him for the past decade, and I am always eager to learn from his world-class expertise in OOH, DOOH, pDOOH, and smart marketing! I have watched Tractor grow from strength to strength, and his passion and dedication have put a key ingredient in this! I would highly recommend working with Remi to anyone who wants to challenge themselves to think outside the box, and do things differently.
